title: Connector config descriptor
description: Machine-readable per-connector configuration contract consumed by the mcp UI. Holds requirements/permissions/instructions only — never secret values (secrets stay in the operator runtime via SecretResolver). Structural rules live here; the semantic rules (id==source_id, modes subset of capabilities, conditional instructions[].ref) are enforced by scripts/validate_connector_config.py.

id.description: Stable connector id; equals the folder name AND the connector's source_id.

description.description: One-line summary for the UI connector card.

icon.description: Optional icon/logo slug for the UI.

available.description: Canonical 'show as available vs coming-soon' flag the UI keys off (status/live_readiness can disagree).

key.description: The SecretResolver key (source_id, or a namespaced key for multi-credential connectors).

modes.description: Which run modes this credential serves. ABSENT or EMPTY = all modes (the runner requires it on any run). A mode-scoped run requires only credentials serving that mode.

header.description: How the credential is presented on the wire (e.g. 'Authorization (raw, no Bearer)').

wiring_oversight.description: True when the credential's wiring (e.g. OAuth token exchange/refresh) needs operator oversight beyond the UI.

validation.description: Optional regex/format hint to catch paste errors.

label.description: The inbound URL the operator pastes INTO the provider (distinct from setup.url).

ref.description: Citation back to the verified auth.md/references line. REQUIRED for open_url/register_webhook/configure (enforced by the validator).

ingestion_gate.description: Optional display hints for the Ingestion Gate UI. Presentational only — no review commands, governance policy, or secret storage. Bot-owned governance still controls review actions.

source_title_template.description: Template for the source row title in the Ingestion Gate UI; placeholders like {channel_name} are filled by the rendering layer from adapter-emitted fields.

source_type_label.description: Short noun for the evidence kind (e.g. 'Slack message', 'Devin session').

summary_fields.description: Ordered adapter-emitted field names shown in the evidence summary row.

evidence_labels.description: Map of adapter evidence-kind keys to human display labels.

empty_state.description: Message shown when no evidence has been ingested from this source.
